Title: Digital Skills Audit
Description: Identify the digital skills you already have, the gaps holding back your career, and where to invest your learning time.
SchemaJson: {"id":"digital_skills_audit_v1","title":"Digital Skills Audit","version":"1.0","questions":[{"id":"q1","type":"rating","label":"How confident are you in your overall digital skills compared to colleagues in your field?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q2","type":"choice","label":"Which digital skill area do you most want to develop?","options":["Spreadsheets and data analysis","Presentation and document tools","Collaboration platforms (Teams, Slack, Notion)","Data visualisation and reporting","AI tools and automation"],"required":true},{"id":"q3","type":"choice","label":"How often do you use spreadsheets for data analysis or reporting?","options":["Daily","Several times a week","Occasionally","Rarely","Never"],"required":true},{"id":"q4","type":"rating","label":"How comfortable are you learning new digital tools independently?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q5","type":"text","label":"Which specific digital tool or skill gap is most holding back your work or career right now?","required":false}]}
